case_title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. KEISHA RAYMOND et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-04-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT RAYMOND, KEISHA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT RAYMOND, KEISHA HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KEISHA RAYMOND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AFTER SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ORDER. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, CSR # 5153

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT KEISHA RAYMOND'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS sustained with 5 days leave to amend after service of notice of order. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR # 5153 = (301/MJM)
